text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun has managed to leave quite a
mark on the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Together, we've successfully navigated the crucial
first three years of her career.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
And then... Maya and Trainer live together all
lovey-dovey! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Happily ever after! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Come on, you two, get your heads out of the
clouds.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hey. Don't be a killjoy, Hishiama!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: You're calling me a killjoy? Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: You shouldn't keep her waiting. Hurry up.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I'll head out first. Make sure you're not late!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ...Hey, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
It looks like everyone has already fallen in love
with me.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, I guess I've got no choice but to head out,
huh? I mean, it's for their sake! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, thanks for waiting! ☆

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Who would wait for you?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! You're the one who suggested partner
running after school!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Now I'm angry, Brian! You'll be eating my fumes!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Heheh! There's nothing I can't do!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! Awaiting orders! I'll do whatever you say,
so lay it on me!
choice_data_list: Twinkle as bright as you can!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Copy that! ☆ Hehe, to the sky!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: It's time for takeoff! ☆
